title: endotropis standleyana
intro: Endotropis standleyana, also known as the Standley's butterfly pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Endotropis standleyana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, diarrhea, and other ailments.
